headline: Kimberly-Clark Maps Kenvue Integration As Valuation Suggests Upside Potential
summary: Kimberly-Clark (NasdaqGS:KMB) has outlined its post acquisition organizational structure ahead of integrating Kenvue. The company is forming four regional business segments to manage operations across its expanded global footprint. Chairman and CEO Mike Hsu is set to continue leading the combined organization. Kimberly-Clark, best known for its global personal care and tissue brands, is preparing for a larger role in consumer health and hygiene with the planned integration of Kenvue. The...

headline: Kimberly-Clark keeps Urdaneta as CFO of combined company
summary: The Huggies parent laid out the organizational structure and executive leadership team it will put in place after its $40 billion acquisition of Kenvue closes in the latter half of this year.

headline: Are Options Traders Betting on a Big Move in Kenvue Stock?

headline: Kimberly-Clark's New Structure Sets Stage for Kenvue Integration
summary: Kimberly-Clark's lean new regional structure is built for speed as it prepares to integrate Kenvue in a $48.7B deal closing in H2 2026.
